notice.title: Final Term Examination Schedule
notice.content: The Final Term Examination routine has been officially published. Students are advised to check their respective slots and venues carefully. Examination starts from May 15th.

notice.title: OmniVault Annual Hackathon
notice.content: Registration is now open for the Annual OmniVault Hackathon. Form teams of 3-4 and submit your projects by April 20th. Exciting prizes from local tech partners!

notice.title: New Lab 404 Access Policy
notice.content: Starting next week, Lab 404 will be open 24/7 for senior-year students working on their thesis. Use your biometric ID for entry. Please maintain the hardware properly.

notice.title: GitHub Education Hub for OmniVault
notice.content: We have partnered with GitHub to provide the Student Developer Pack to all OmniVault students. Check your university email for the unique invitation link.

notice.title: ACM ICPC Regional Preliminary Mock Test
notice.content: A mock competitive programming contest will be held this Saturday. All participants are encouraged to join to test their problem-solving speed and team coordination.
